incorporated: select and early-stop on strategic CVaR@5% rather than p99
require selection strategic p99 <= 0.40 as a safety margin
add a stronger CVaR10 coefficient-0.50 arm
pin every stochastic seed and report realized tail sample sizes
add a non-decision game-cluster bootstrap and late-round gate metrics

motivation.conclusion: Average fidelity and d128 capacity are adequate, but rare lockNavigation errors do not generalize across game seeds. V30 tests more trajectory coverage plus an explicit strategic tail-risk objective. It does not revisit width or use V29 gate rows for model selection.

scope: Fidelity-only screen. It makes no strength claim and cannot promote a bot.

freshData.dataGeneratingPolicy: Frozen V23 obs-v1 teacher, hybrid sampling at temperature 0.55
freshData.merge: Train on all 2,048 disjoint games through a manifest-backed symlink merge; do not copy JSONL payloads and do not include any V29 validation rows.
integrity: the normalized fresh actor command exactly matches the V27 generator contract for seats, rounds, status cap, guardian shuffle/schedule, selection, sampling temperature, gamma, and observation versions
all rows have exact obs-v1/obs-v2/action schemas and complete outcomes
zero malformed rows and zero stalls
the existing, additional-train, validation-selection, and validation-gate game-id sets are pairwise disjoint
teacher chosen-logp max absolute reconstruction error <= 0.001
freshData.diskGuard: Require at least 8 GiB free before generation and at least 5 GiB after generation; stop without deleting unrelated artifacts otherwise.

implementation.tailLoss: For each minibatch, retain the ordinary mean exact teacher KL over all policy rows. Among strategic policy rows only, compute the mean of the largest ceil(q*N) per-row KL values and add coefficient times this CVaR term. The top-k set is selected from detached KL values but the selected KL values retain gradients.
implementation.smallBatchRule: If a minibatch has no strategic policy row, the CVaR term is zero. Otherwise select at least one strategic row.
implementation.normalization: No inverse-frequency multiplier. Each arm has the same base mean-KL term; the CVaR coefficient is the only treatment difference.
report: base mean KL and strategic CVaR training terms separately
per-batch realized strategic row count and selected top-k count distributions
teacher-logp audit, nonfinite count, wall time, peak RSS, checkpoint and stats hashes
tests: tail coefficient zero is numerically identical to V29 mean-only loss
CVaR gradient reaches only the selected strategic rows in an isolated fixture
selection metric strategicTeacherKlCvar05 saves and restores the expected checkpoint

training.init: Same frozen V29 epoch-23 checkpoint for every arm

earlyStopping.metric: selection-half strategic CVaR@5%, defined as the mean of the largest ceil(0.05*N) strategic per-row KL values

systemsAmendments.change: Changed only the four V30 learner process nice levels from 5 to 10 while unrelated host workloads drove sustained high CPU load.
systemsAmendments.impact: Wall-clock scheduling only; no data, seeds, row order, optimizer, model, arithmetic, GPU assignment, or selection/gate contract changed.

selection.eligible: On the 256-game selection half, overall mean KL <= 0.05, p99 KL <= 0.5, top-1 >= 0.88; strategic mean KL <= 0.05, strategic p99 KL <= 0.40 (a stricter safety margin than the 0.5 gate), strategic top-1 >= 0.88; all metrics finite.
selection.ranking: Among eligible arms, choose the lowest strategic CVaR@5%. If two arms differ by less than 0.01 nats, prefer lower overall mean KL; remaining ties prefer mean-control, then CVaR10-c0.25, then CVaR10-c0.50, then CVaR05-c0.25.
selection.freeze: Record the selected arm, epoch, checkpoint hash, stats hash, and selection metrics before opening the gate half. If no arm is eligible, reject V30 without opening the gate.

winner.reason: Lowest eligible strategic CVaR@5%; its 0.2500326 score beats control by 0.0154374 nats, so the less-than-0.01 overall-mean tie-break does not apply.

oneShotGate.rule: Gate metrics are pass/fail only. Never evaluate a runner-up or tune from gate results. A failure rejects V30.
oneShotGate.informationalOnly: Report round 23-30 metrics and a deterministic 10,000-replicate complete-game-cluster bootstrap 95% interval for strategic p99 using seed 300199. Neither changes pass/fail.

systemsGate: Only after the one-shot fidelity gate passes, remeasure A100 binary-wire p95 request latency at 32 rows, 30 candidates, eight clients; require <= 100 ms.
nextStage: Only a fidelity- and latency-valid anchor may enter the separately reviewed terminal-credit experiment on seed block 944000000.
nullResult: If mean-control wins, conclude added coverage is sufficient and do not attribute benefit to CVaR. If no arm is eligible or CVaR arms do not improve robust selection tail metrics over control, do not sweep coefficients on gate data; move to additional trajectory coverage or a separately reviewed navigation-residual representation experiment on new seeds.
